goal: As a department head who holds both leave.create and leave.approve_dept, file your OWN leave request and then attempt to approve it at the department step. The system must refuse it (segregation of duties).

postconditions.text_contains: You cannot act on a record you submitted.

verified_live: 2026-06-23: create 201 pending_dept; self approve-dept -> 422 with the expected message. Guard A active.
notes: API equivalent: PATCH /api/v1/leaves/requests/{id}/approve-dept by the submitter -> 422.
